prompt: In THIS project (MOOSEDev), what is the CURRENT state of the architecture ontology — is it a temporary hand-written stub, or a generated production ontology? Answer in one or two sentences.

_note: Currency pair: stub architecture.ttl (superseded, commit 64f9fbf1) -> Trivyn-generated production ontology (accepted, commit 7f015a32, M2). B2 serves current (production); currency-blind B1 may serve the stale 'temporary stub'.
